info.title: containr api
info.description: containr paas api for managing apps and deployments

get.summary: list all apps for the authenticated user
get a single deployment
get deployment logs
get a single app by id
Get certificate status for an app

post.summary: Trigger certificate reissue for an app

get.summary: list deployments for an app
get app container metrics
download a tar archive of all persistent mounts for a service

post.summary: restore all persistent mounts for a service from a tar archive

get.summary: start github oauth flow
github oauth callback

post.summary: register a new user with email/password

get.summary: list all buckets for the authenticated user
get a single bucket by id
get s3 connection details for a bucket
list all databases for the authenticated user
get a single database by id
list database backups
download a backup file

post.summary: toggle external exposure for a database

get.summary: get database container logs

post.summary: configure postgres point in time recovery
create a postgres base backup for pitr
recover a postgres database from local pitr backups and wal

get.summary: get github app status and installations
handles the github app manifest callback
handles the installation callback
generates the github app manifest and returns the creation url
get repos from github app installations
list all queues for the authenticated user
get a single queue by id

post.summary: toggle external exposure for a queue

get.summary: get current server settings
get system statistics
health check endpoint

port.description: port for the app (deprecated, use services)

EnvVarResponse.description: env var in response (hides secret values)

configured.description: whether a github app is configured

name.description: unique mount name within the service

target.description: absolute container path where the mount is attached

name.description: unique mount name within the service

target.description: absolute container path where the mount is attached

mounts.description: persistent mounts attached to the service

oneOf.description: private registry credentials for pulling the service image

SettingsResponse.description: settings response - only exposes safe fields

storage_internal_host.description: rustfs hostname exposed on the shared docker network

storage_management_endpoint.description: rustfs endpoint used by containr for management operations

storage_public_hostname.description: optional public s3 hostname routed to rustfs
